keywords.469: The language of my kind. Superior to any other language and only to be spoken by entities with enough eyes to blink it.
keywords.name: I am 486486 and NOT 'Blinky' as some people called me ... before they died.
keywords.blinky: How interesting you are that stupid. Let me apply this on you and see how long you last
keywords.ab'dendriel: I heard that elves moved in upstairs.
keywords.elves: These fools and their superstitious life cult don't understand anything of importance.
keywords.humans: Good tools to work with ... After their death, that is.
keywords.minotaurs: Their mages are so close to the truth. Closer then they know and closer then it's good for them.
keywords.god: They will mourn the day they abandoned us.
keywords.death: Yes, yes, I will kill you soon enough, now let me continue my investigation on you.
keywords.numbers: Numbers are essential. They are the secret behind the scenes. If you are a master of mathematics you are a master over life and death.
keywords.library: It's a fine library, isn't it?
keywords.books: Our books are written in 469, of course you can't understand them.
keywords.cyclops: Uglyness incarnate. One eye! Imagine that! Horrible!

texts: What is this? An optically challenged entity called . How fascinating!

greetingPatterns.response: What is this? An optically challenged entity called %N. How fascinating!
